subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Abu'l-Hasan Mírza
subcodes.first_line: O kind Friend! What thy musk-laden pen hath inscribed bestowed joy and brought delight. It was not a dew-drop
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان آنچه کلک مشکین نگاشت شادمانی بخشید و خرمی آورد
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God
